items.q: What type of bond forms when electrons are transferred?
items.explanation: Electron transfer forms ions that attract.

items.q: What is the approximate molar mass of NaCl (g/mol)? (set 35)
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.

items.q: What is the approximate molar mass of NH3 (g/mol)? (set 29)
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.

items.q: Name the compound with formula KNO3.
items.explanation: KNO3 is commonly called potassium nitrate.

items.q: Ionic bonds involve sharing electron pairs equally.
items.explanation: This is a standard mid-level chemistry concept.

items.q: What compound name matches the formula CH4?
Name the compound with formula CH4.
What is the approximate molar mass of HCl (g/mol)? (set 32)
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.

items.q: A mole is approximately 6.022 x 10^23 particles.
items.explanation: This is a standard mid-level chemistry concept.

items.q: What is the pH range of acidic solutions?
items.explanation: Acids have pH values lower than neutral 7.
